title: Octopuses Can Edit Their Own RNA
script_summary: Octopuses have a unique ability to edit their RNA, a process that allows them to adapt and modify their genetic information.

segments.voiceover: Did you know octopuses can rewrite their own genetic messages?
They can perform A-to-I RNA editing, transforming their neural transcripts on the fly.
But hold on, this isn't DNA rewriting!
Research from scientists like Rosenthal and Liscovitch-Brauer shows these edits enhance their adaptability.
This RNA editing helps octopuses thrive in different environments, reacting to challenges in real-time.
It’s an evolutionary trade-off, balancing complexity with survival. Incredible, right?
Curious about more weird science? Hit follow for more!
